Dramatic manga speed lines, halftone textures, vector shapes, abstract starbursts, and explosive graphic elements collide around her in layered depth, creating a feeling of motion and impact. Rich cherry-red, cream, black, and warm gold tones dominate the palette. images.alt: A minimalist abstract painting displayed on a canvas mounted against a textured grey concrete wall. The composition depicts a vast, misty seascape rendered in soft flowing whites, pale sage greens, and muted steel blues. On the left, a dramatic cliff edge drops away in smooth cascading streaks of white and grey, like frozen waterfalls or folded silk. In the center-right of the scene stands a tiny solitary ghostly figure — featureless, draped in a flowing white shroud — gazing toward the horizon. On the horizon, a glowing orb of deep amber, orange, and red burns through the haze, the only warm accent in an otherwise cool, ethereal palette. The entire image has a soft, motion-blurred, painterly quality, as if reality is dissolving into fog. Profound sense of solitude and contemplation.

Title: The Long Night's Work
Style: Classic Film Noir cinematography (high contrast black and white or desaturated color), influenced by Humphrey Bogart films and Edward Hopper's lonely city paintings
Prompt in ALT

images.alt:
A film noir-inspired scene: a female private investigator in 1940s fashion (trench coat over silk blouse, pinned-up hair, bold red lipstick slightly smudged) reads case files by a single cigarette lighter flame or small candle in her cluttered office. Venetian blind shadows stripe across her face and the documents. Rain streaks the window behind her. A bottle of cheap whiskey and an ashtray full of cigarettes sit on the desk. A .38 revolver rests beside the files. She's been working all night and the weight shows—but so does her relentless determination to find the truth.
Style: Classic Film Noir cinematography (high contrast black and white or desaturated color), influenced by Humphrey Bogart films and Edward Hopper's lonely city paintings
Composition: Over-the-shoulder view looking down at documents then up to face, venetian blinds creating graphic shadow pattern across entire frame, deep perspective through office space to rainy window, claustrophobic yet revealing
Lighting: Extreme chiaroscuro with single small light source creating deep blacks and bright highlights, blind shadows as graphic element, overall low-key with perhaps 90% of frame in shadow, slight warm tone to light against cool shadows
Adjectives: Gritty, noir, determined, shadowy, classic

. The recipe prompt needs ingredients and cooking time. The project timeline needs deadlines and dependencies. Different jobs need different prompts.

record.bridgyOriginalText: Your 5-Minute Reality Check: Tonight, sit down at home and try this. Pick two completely different tasks. Maybe you want a recipe for dinner and you also want help drafting a project timeline for work. Write a prompt for each one. Don't use any template. Just describe what you need in plain language, include the specific details that matter for that task, and tell the AI what format you want the answer in. Notice how the two prompts look nothing alike. That's the point (6/8)
